bead.title: Resolve 90 duplicate-ID issues reported by ddx doc audit
bead.description:
ddx doc audit reports 87 duplicate_id and 2 missing_dep issues, all pre-existing (not caused by the 2026-05 redesign). Two distinct sources observed during the redesign verification:

1. **Migration leftovers**: docs/resources/ still contains agent-harness-ac.md, agent-harness-ac-work.md, ai-agent-frameworks-2025.md, microsoft-ai-agents-2025.md, model-catalog.md, spec-driven.md AND README.md, despite B2 (ddx-a812e176) having moved them under docs/helix/00-discover/. The duplicate IDs (e.g. AC-AGENT-001 in both docs/resources/ and docs/helix/00-discover/research/) are because B2 created the new artifacts but didn't delete the originals. Fix: delete docs/resources/*.md (keeping only the README.md stub if it still serves a purpose, or deleting the directory entirely).

2. **In-repo single-file duplicates**: SD-021..023, TD-004..011, TP-002..020, ddx-concerns, helix.prd, helix.workflow.principles, product-vision, exec.FEAT-006.*, exec.FEAT-011.* — these IDs appear once in their canonical file but the docgraph scanner is finding them twice. Investigation needed: scanner may be picking up frontmatter blocks twice within the same file, or there's a scan-path overlap (e.g., .agents/skills/ or .claude/skills/ trees that contain doc copies). Run 'ddx doc audit -v' for verbose paths and 'rg -l "id: SD-021"' to find true duplicates.

Missing-dep (2): helix.workflow.principles → helix.workflow (the parent doc), and read-coverage-audit-2026-04-29 → plan-2026-04-29-artifact-and-run-architecture. Either restore the missing docs or update the depends_on.
bead.acceptance: 1. After the bead's commits land, 'ddx doc audit' reports zero duplicate_id issues. 2. 'ddx doc audit' reports zero missing_dep issues OR the remaining missing_dep entries are explicitly justified in commit message. 3. docs/resources/ either deleted or contains only an explanatory stub. 4. Commit captures audit output before/after as evidence under .ddx/executions/<run-id>/audit-before.txt and audit-after.txt.
